message: fix: parse trailing unterminated JSON fences

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,11 @@ describe("memory extraction", () => {
 		expect(parseExtractionJson('Here is the JSON:
```json
[{"text":"unterminated"}]
')).toEqual([
 			{ text: "unterminated" },
 		]);
+		expect(
+			parseExtractionJson(
+				'```ts
export {}
```
Actual JSON:
```json
[{"text":"after code"}]
',
+			),
+		).toEqual([{ text: "after code" }]);
 		expect(parseExtractionJson('```
[{"text":"plain"}]
```')).toEqual([{ text: "plain" }]);
 		expect(parseExtractionJson('```
[{"text":"plain unterminated"}]
')).toEqual([
 			{ text: "plain unterminated" },
